title: Mediterranean Cashew Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and nutritious stir fry made with mediterranean spices, caramelized ingredients, and crunchy cashews.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until caramelized, stirring occasionally.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chopped bell pepper and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the sliced cucumber and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the chopped tomato and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the caramelized onions, cashews, mediterranean spice blend, salt, and black pepper.
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
